installGuidance.avoidForCloneInstall: packages/occam-mcp/bin/occam-mcp.js on a git clone — exits with INSTALL.md instructions; use scripts/occam-wrapper.sh (Hermes) or launch-mcp-host.mjs
installGuidance.npxPath: npx @ff-occam/mcp — not part of 1.0.0-rc.2; use GitHub tarball or OCCAM_HOME + launch-mcp-host.mjs

default.summary: Bundled Chromium, pool size 1, no proxy

hermes-headless.summary: Banner off, shared daemon, pool size 1

mass-scrape.summary: Isolated browser, higher parallelism — configure OCCAM_PROXY_LIST_FILE separately
